title: selaginella lacerata
intro: Selaginella lacerata, also known as Spike Moss, is a type of evergreen plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella lacerata include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and providing antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
